gate.exception: The 250 KB/1 MB target is not yet feasible while shipping the documented standalone CLI/MCP tooling, deterministic change-integrity surfaces, schemas, and consumer guidance. Phase Y recalibrates once from the clean Linux 3.6.1 candidate at 4d0d526 (467,437 packed bytes, 1,572,950 unpacked bytes, 133 files) with at least 10% headroom: 515,000 packed bytes, 1,731,000 unpacked bytes, and 147 files. Legacy migration/demo and experimental-runtime hardening guides remain repository-hosted, source maps were removed in V04, and this exception must be reconsidered before ArkGate 4.
